name: Lindy.ai
description: Lindy.ai is a no-code AI agent platform that lets users create autonomous 'AI employees' for customer support, recruiting, sales, scheduling, and back-office workflows. It features a visual workflow builder, template marketplace, trigger-based automation, and 3,000+ integrations.
oneLiner: No-code platform for creating AI employees that automate support, recruiting, sales, and operations.
funding: ~$33M total raised (Series A led by NEA, Airtree Ventures, Abstract Ventures)
pricing: Free (400 credits/mo), Pro ($49.99/mo, 5K credits), Business ($299/mo, 30K credits), Enterprise (custom)
capabilities: Trigger system (email, schedule, webhook, form, Slack, calendar)
3,000+ integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Slack, Zoom, Notion)

uxAnalysis.builderFlow: Select a template or start from scratch. Visual builder presents a flowchart canvas with trigger, AI, and action nodes. Configure each node via side panel with natural language instructions, variable mappings, and credentials. Test in real-time with sample inputs. Toggle on to deploy instantly. Template to live agent in under 5 minutes.
strengths: Fastest time-to-deploy — functional agents in under 2 minutes from templates
Visual builder intuitive for non-technical business users
Natural language configuration removes prompt engineering expertise
Societies of Lindies multi-agent orchestration without code
Live testing creates tight feedback loop
weaknesses: Credit-based pricing unpredictable at high volume
No MCP or open tool-use protocol
Opaque LLM reasoning — no chain-of-thought visibility
Basic RBAC compared to enterprise platforms
notableFeatures: Societies of Lindies — multi-agent collaboration and delegation
AI phone agent for inbound/outbound calls
Meeting intelligence (auto notes, summaries, action items)

recentDevelopments: 2025 Q1: Launched Societies of Lindies multi-agent orchestration
2025 Q2: AI voice/phone agent for customer support
2025 Q3: Enterprise tier with SSO, SOC 2 Type II, SLAs
2025 Q3: ~$33M total funding, Series A led by NEA
2026 Q1: 50+ templates across new verticals including legal and finance

subCriteria.name: Agent Builder UX
subCriteria.rationale: Best-in-class no-code builder. Drag-and-drop flowchart. Intuitive for non-technical users.

subCriteria.name: Time-to-Value
subCriteria.rationale: 50+ pre-built templates for support, recruiting, sales, scheduling. Deploy in under 2 min.

subCriteria.name: Debugging & Testing
subCriteria.rationale: Describe agent behavior in plain English. Lowers barrier significantly.

subCriteria.name: Documentation & Learning
subCriteria.rationale: Live testing in builder. Instant deploy. Version history with rollback. Very fast feedback loop.

subCriteria.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
subCriteria.rationale: Societies of Lindies — agents collaborate, delegate, share context. Strong differentiator.

subCriteria.name: Human-in-the-Loop Design
subCriteria.rationale: First-class approval gates, escalation paths, human review steps.

subCriteria.name: Workflow Templates
subCriteria.rationale: Shared workspaces. No simultaneous editing or review workflows for agent configs.

subCriteria.name: Team Development
subCriteria.rationale: Shared workspaces. No simultaneous editing or review workflows for agent configs.

subCriteria.name: Native Connectors
subCriteria.rationale: 3,000+ integrations. Major CRM, comms, productivity, dev tools with read/write.

subCriteria.name: API & Protocol Standards
subCriteria.rationale: Custom API calls, webhook triggers. Headers, auth, payload config supported.

subCriteria.name: Authentication & Access
subCriteria.rationale: Tool calling within workflow nodes. No MCP or standardized protocol. Proprietary framework.

subCriteria.name: Data Pipeline & RAG
subCriteria.rationale: Tool calling within workflow nodes. No MCP or standardized protocol. Proprietary framework.

subCriteria.name: Guardrails & Kill Switches
subCriteria.rationale: Team-level access on Business/Enterprise. Limited per-agent RBAC granularity.

subCriteria.name: Audit Trail & Compliance
subCriteria.rationale: Workflow approval nodes with Slack/email notification. Agents disable instantly.

subCriteria.name: RBAC & Access Control
subCriteria.rationale: SOC 2 Type II. Execution logs. Enterprise compliance features. Lags dedicated platforms.

subCriteria.name: Explainability & Transparency
subCriteria.rationale: SOC 2 Type II. Execution logs. Enterprise compliance features. Lags dedicated platforms.

subCriteria.name: Deployment Flexibility
subCriteria.rationale: Cloud-only SaaS. No self-hosted option. Limitation for data-residency-sensitive enterprises.

subCriteria.name: Scaling & Monitoring
subCriteria.rationale: Basic execution logs and task history. No performance dashboards or custom alerting.

subCriteria.name: Cost Management
subCriteria.rationale: Auto-scaling cloud infra. Concurrent agents. Credit-gated but technically capable.

subCriteria.name: Ecosystem Maturity
subCriteria.rationale: Growing user base. Product Hunt attention. Nascent vs established platforms.

scoringRationale: Lindy scores 72/100. Builder Experience (15) is standout — best no-code visual builder with templates and NL config. Integration (14) excellent breadth. Collaboration (12) strong with Societies of Lindies. Deployment (11), Governance (10), Ecosystem (10) need maturation for enterprise.
targetUser: Business operators automating support, sales, HR workflows without code

communityBuzz: Getting TikTok coverage — @onetechnations showing Lindy Agent automation (675 views)
Lindy 3.0 Agent Builder praised for vibe-coding approach — describe what you want in English
Societies of Lindies multi-agent feature generating positive buzz
Credit-based pricing criticized as unpredictable at scale
7,000+ integrations via Pipedream partnership expanding connector breadth

walkthrough.title: How Lindy.ai Works: Create an AI Employee in Minutes

steps.title: Choose a Template or Start from Scratch
steps.description: Browse 50+ pre-built templates for customer support, recruiting, sales, scheduling, and operations. Or describe your agent's purpose in plain English to start from scratch.

steps.title: Configure the Workflow Visually
steps.description: Use the drag-and-drop flowchart canvas to build your agent's logic. Add trigger nodes (email, Slack, webhook, schedule), AI reasoning nodes, and action nodes. Configure each via a side panel with natural language instructions.

steps.title: Connect Integrations
steps.description: Wire up 3,000+ integrations including Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Slack, Zoom, and Notion. Each integration provides read/write actions your agent can use in its workflow.

steps.title: Test with Live Data
steps.description: Run your agent with sample inputs directly in the builder. See real-time execution traces showing which nodes fired, what the AI decided, and what actions were taken. Iterate until the workflow handles edge cases correctly.

steps.title: Deploy and Orchestrate Societies
steps.description: Toggle your agent on to deploy instantly. Create 'Societies of Lindies' where multiple agents collaborate — one handles triage, another drafts responses, a third escalates to humans. Monitor execution logs and credit usage from the dashboard.
